name: side-quest
description: Launch backgrounded side-quests that implement changes in isolated git worktrees and deliver per project config.

interface.shortDescription: Launch backgrounded side-quests in isolated git worktrees.
interface.longDescription: Use Side-Quest when Codex should delegate a change to a background worker running in its own isolated git worktree. The plugin exposes the sidequest MCP server for launching, listing, and inspecting side-quests, and includes a skill that maps user requests to those MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Launch a side-quest for this goal: improve the confusing action buttons.
List the running side-quests and show me the latest logs for one that is still active.
